rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Chicago Title Company'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift The Stay Of Proceedings Entered By The Court Under Ccp 1281.4
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2015, line 1. Defendant Chicago Title Company's And Motion To Lift The Stay Of Proceedings Off calendar, amended notice of motion filed on January 6, 2015. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift The Stay Of Proceedings Entered By The Court Under Ccp 1281.4
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's Amended Motion To Lift The Stay Of Proceedings GRANTED, non-opposition filed. The stay ordered by October 26, 2010 is lifted. Chicago Title Company shall file a response within 30 days. Prevailing party prepare order. Plaintiff and its counsel are ordered co comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT PADRAIC HALLINAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege (1) relationship between Plaintiff and Mr. Hallinan supporting unlawful detainer action; and (2) compliance with or exemption from SFRO. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. DAVID A ALLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 26, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT DAVID ALLEN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Notice of Intent includes sufficient information re: "rent applicable to each residential unit;" Plaintiff complied with Govt. Code 7060.4(b)(5); advice regarding re-rental rights was sufficient. = (501/RBU)
